title: CSA Releases a Quantum-Safe Handbook and Quantum Readiness Index
summary: Press release announcing the Cyber Security Agency of Singapore's Quantum-Safe Handbook and Quantum Readiness Index. Public consultation on the quantum-safe materials runs until end December 2025.

title: Senior Minister of State Tan Kiat How, Committee of Supply 2026 Speech
summary: Committee of Supply 2026 speech stating the Singapore government's position that Post-Quantum Cryptography (PQC) will be the mainstream solution for quantum-safe migration.

title: 18 Projects Awarded a Total of $16 Million in Funding at CyberSG Innovation Day 2025
summary: Press release announcing S$16 million of CSA funding for 18 cybersecurity research and innovation projects under the CyberSG R&D Programme. The visible description does not explicitly confirm a PQC component, so it is flagged for human review.

title: Opening Address by Minister Josephine Teo at the High-Level Panel (AI), 22 October 2025
summary: Ministerial speech referencing Singapore's intent to thrive in a post-quantum future, both harnessing opportunities and managing risks. The visible excerpt does not explicitly name post-quantum cryptography, so it is flagged for human review.

title: Banque de France and Monetary Authority of Singapore Conduct Post-Quantum Cryptography Experiment
summary: Media release on a joint post-quantum cryptography experiment between the Banque de France and the Monetary Authority of Singapore, aimed at strengthening communication and data security against quantum computing advancements.

title: MAS Advisory on Quantum Computing and Post-Quantum Cryptography
summary: Regulatory advisory circular from the Monetary Authority of Singapore on the cybersecurity risks of quantum computing for financial institutions, referencing NIST's global standardisation process for post-quantum cryptography (PQC).

title: MAS and Industry Partners Publish Technical Report on Proof-of-Concept Quantum Security Sandbox
summary: Media release announcing publication of a technical report on a proof-of-concept quantum security sandbox, following the Post-Quantum Cryptography (PQC) experiment with the Banque de France the previous year.

title: Singapore Financial Sector Quantum-Safe Technology Sandbox Report
summary: Technical report on the Singapore financial sector quantum key distribution (QKD) sandbox, including tests combining QKD with Post-Quantum Cryptography (PQC) digital signing for file transfer to address QKD's limitations.

title: FSTI Quantum Track
summary: MAS funding scheme page for the Financial Sector Technology and Innovation (FSTI) Quantum track, supporting pilots that explore approaches such as Post-Quantum Cryptography (PQC) and Quantum Key Distribution (QKD).

title: MAS Commits up to S$100 Million to Support Quantum and Artificial Intelligence Capabilities
summary: Media release on MAS committing up to S$100 million to support quantum and AI capabilities in the financial sector, including Post-Quantum Cryptography (PQC) and Quantum Key Distribution (QKD) to safeguard firms' critical data.

title: Request for Proposal: Quantum Computing and Its Implication on Cybersecurity of the Financial Sector
summary: MAS request for proposal exploring the potential post-quantum landscape of the financial sector, including the development of quantum-resistant cryptography.

title: Quantum-Safe Technologies
summary: IMDA programme page on quantum-safe technologies under which businesses can work with National Quantum-Safe Network Plus (NQSN+) operators to integrate quantum-safe solutions such as Quantum Key Distribution (QKD) and Post-Quantum Cryptography (PQC).

title: Reference Specification: Secure Deployment of Quantum Key Distribution Networks (Draft for Public Comment)
summary: Draft IMDA reference specification, issued for public comment, on the secure deployment of quantum key distribution networks; it requires the QKD module to key manager link to use cryptographic algorithms with appropriate computational security, including post-quantum cryptographic techniques.

title: Reference Specification: Quantum Key Distribution Networks (Issue 1, Draft for Public Comment)
summary: Draft IMDA reference specification for quantum key distribution networks, noting that QKD keys can be combined with Post-Quantum Cryptography (PQC) and that PQC can be used as an authentication method to initialise QKD operation.

title: Fact Sheet: Quantum-Safe Singapore
summary: IMDA fact sheet on Singapore's quantum-safe activities, including training programmes on quantum technologies covering QKD, Post-Quantum Cryptography and quantum computing.

title: Technology Roadmap Working Group 4: AI, Data and Blockchain (Slides)
summary: IMDA technology roadmap working group slides covering post-quantum cryptographic schemes, blockchains using quantum cryptography, and the quantum-proofing of existing blockchains by replacing vulnerable components.

title: Singapore Launches Southeast Asia's First Quantum-Safe Network Infrastructure
summary: Press release announcing the National Quantum-Safe Network Plus (NQSN+), which aims to deliver quantum-safe communications across Singapore.

title: Digital Connectivity Blueprint Report
summary: IMDA Digital Connectivity Blueprint stating that Singapore needs to be ready to adopt quantum security technologies such as Post-Quantum Cryptography (PQC) and Quantum Key Distribution (QKD).

title: Quantum-Safe Migration Handbook (Draft for Public Consultation)
summary: Draft Quantum-Safe Migration Handbook released by CSA for public consultation, offering practical migration guidance and referencing PQC roadmap categories recommended by the Post-Quantum Cryptography Coalition.
